name: Essex Indoor Golf Center
about: Essex Indoor Golf Center is a premier golf simulation venue offering a spacious and clean environment for golfers and non-golfers alike. The facility utilizes aboutGolf® simulators, which are PGA Tour-approved and showcase over 70 elite courses worldwide, including fantasy options. Bay rentals are charged by the hour, with rates of $50 per hour Monday-Thursday and $55 per hour Friday-Sunday, for up to four players per bay. The venue also features a full-service restaurant, The Grumpy Caddy Grille, and hosts leagues, events, and trivia nights.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA Tour-approved aboutGolf® simulators with highly accurate tracking
Access to over 70 elite and fantasy golf courses from around the world
On-site full-service restaurant and bar (The Grumpy Caddy Grille)
Six private simulator bays available for booking
Family-friendly and welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: The Grumpy Caddy Grille serves made-to-order burgers, crispy fries, tots, and an ever-expanding menu. Outside food and beverages are not permitted except for water.
A 35-foot custom bar serves local microbrews, global favorites, canned cocktails, and wine. League players receive a 10% discount on all food and beverages.

simulator_hardware.notes: Used by the Golf Channel and PGA Tour-approved for accuracy.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or borrow loaner clubs provided by the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and beverages are not permitted, with the exception of water. The venue has a full-service restaurant and bar, The Grumpy Caddy Grille.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time depends on skill level. An experienced golfer can complete 18 holes in about 1 hour. For 2 golfers, plan for approximately 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Essex Indoor Golf Center has a clean, family-friendly atmosphere and hosts trivia nights, making it suitable for families and children.
